title: phyllanthus nummularioides
intro: Phyllanthus nummularioides, also known as Earth-coin or Dwarf Phyllanthus, is a type of succulent plant native to Southeast Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nummularioides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes and liver disease. Phyllanthus nummularioides can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
